**Prompt:**
okay, rewrite the ids and project names to reflect our current rendering with formatting(and also, hierarchy: 4_bl00m is the artist id name and seed, met4 , project, born from and parallel to queer project and grinder project, and etc4 is the audio id name (et4l creative label /studio/ where locreance sits under and etceter4 and other collabs, and hopefully eventually other artists entirely and projects , doesn't have to be audio, but would be a home for all explained[idk if that should be the father of the father, but i have ajp media arts as the main main business[then i have ulti tool media for marketing other business{marketing and all related and imp business branches need to be addressed}] and , floating points is a visual project separate but reflective , and then all other projects and ideas we mentioned or whatever , elaborate extensively ;
